expertise.title: Luxury market expertise
expertise.description: Over a decade specialising in premium properties in Lloret de Mar and the Costa Brava, with deep knowledge of both local and international markets.

portfolio.title: Exclusive portfolio
portfolio.description: Access to seafront villas, designer penthouses and unique estates you won't find on any other property portal.

service.title: Bespoke service
service.description: Comprehensive, discreet support at every stage — from the first viewing to completion — with multilingual assistance throughout.

location.title: Local knowledge
location.description: Experts in the finest areas of Lloret de Mar — Fenals, Cala Canyelles, Santa Cristina and beyond — to find your perfect location.

home.lifestyleText: Lloret de Mar offers a unique balance of coastal sophistication and Catalan authenticity. Dream beaches, world-class golf courses, fine dining and the tranquillity of the Costa Brava await just minutes from your new home.
home.ctaSubtitle: Our team of advisors is at your disposal to deliver a real estate experience that exceeds your expectations.

about.title: About Golden Home
about.subtitle: Real estate agency in Lloret de Mar with personalised service on the Costa Brava
about.intro: Golden Home Lloret is a real estate agency in Lloret de Mar, specialising in property sales and advisory across the Costa Brava. From our office on Av. Pau Casals, we support buyers and sellers with a close, transparent and professional approach.
about.mission: To connect each client with the right property in Lloret de Mar and the Costa Brava, offering a clear, honest and personalised service at every stage of the process.
about.vision: To be a trusted local agency, recognised for our market knowledge, the quality of our advice and the direct relationship we build with every client.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We select and present properties with care, focusing on the quality of each opportunity and the detail in every viewing.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We work transparently at every step, providing clear information and avoiding promises we cannot keep.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We use digital tools to make searching easier, share property information efficiently and keep communication agile.

dedication.title: Dedication
dedication.description: We listen to each client's needs and provide close follow-up before, during and after the sale.

timeline.origins: Golden Home was established in Lloret de Mar to offer close, professional real estate service on the Costa Brava.
timeline.localPresence: We work with properties in Lloret de Mar, Blanes and the surrounding area, with direct knowledge of the local market.
timeline.digitalTools: We added digital resources to make searching easier, share property details and follow each transaction more efficiently.
timeline.commitment: We continue to support buyers and sellers with personalised guidance at every stage of the property process.
